message:
feat(test): add obligation lifecycle E2E suite + fix clippy warning (bd-275by, bd-31kgp)

Add 18 comprehensive E2E tests covering obligation lifecycle scenarios:
reserve/commit, reserve/abort, all 4 obligation kinds, cancellation
mid-hold with oracle verification, partial commit then cancel, leak
detection, MPSC channel integration, nested regions, concurrent tasks,
race conditions, runtime-level cancel-all, and hold duration recording.

Fix clippy::assertions_on_constants in region.rs (assert!(false) -> panic!()).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
